problem_summary: Find the instantaneous velocity at t = 3 s for a particle with displacement function S(t) = 2t^3 - 5t^2
candidate_methods: differentiate displacement function to obtain velocity
risks: OCR error in displacement function (e.g., sign or exponent mismatch)
Arithmetic error in derivative evaluation (e.g., miscalculating 6*9 or 10*3)
Confusing velocity (first derivative) with acceleration (second derivative)
